mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, first_name, last_name, password, address_line_1, address_line_2, city, state, post_code, country FROM users ORDER BY CASE WHEN name IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, name ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, email, first_name, last_name, password, address_line_1, address_line_2, city, state, post_code, country FROM users WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email}) LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email})

SELECT id, name, email, first_name, last_name, password, address_line_1, address_line_2, city, state, post_code, country FROM users WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')) ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT(#{name}, '%')) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, name ASC
SELECT id, name, email, first_name, last_name, password, address_line_1, address_line_2, city, state, post_code, country FROM users ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT id, name, email, first_name, last_name, password, address_line_1, address_line_2, city, state, post_code, country FROM users
AND id = #{id}
AND LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%'))
AND LOWER(email) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%'))
ORDER BY CASE WHEN name IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, name ASC, id ASC
